title: A school cooking competition
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: Last month, our school organised a cooking competition for students. Each team had to prepare a simple dish using ingredients chosen (27) the teachers. My group decided to make vegetable pasta because it was quick and healthy. At first, we were worried (28) finishing everything on time, but we worked well together. I cut the vegetables while my friend prepared the sauce. Another student checked the pasta because it needed to cook (29) exactly ten minutes. When the judges tasted our dish, they said it was full (30) flavour and looked colourful. We did not win first prize, but our teacher said our teamwork was excellent. I learned that cooking is easier (31) everyone has a clear job to do. I would definitely like to enter the competition again (32) the future.
